title: SearchView: debounced search logic and cursor pagination
description: Add the live-search and pagination behaviour to SearchView.swift. Implement .task(id: query): trim the query; if empty set loadPhase = .idle, clear articles; otherwise sleep ~300 ms (Task.sleep), treat CancellationError as a no-op, then call apiClient.searchArticles(q:) and populate articles + committedQuery + nextCursor. Add .onSubmit(of: .search) to bypass the debounce delay and run immediately. For pagination, on the last ArticleRowView's .onAppear fetch the next page using committedQuery + nextCursor (ensuring paging never mixes queries). Wrap each NavigationLink destination in ArticlePagerView(articles:startIndex:) matching ArticleListView:119.
acceptance_criteria: Typing triggers a search after ~300 ms with no intermediate requests
Pressing the keyboard search button runs the search immediately
Empty/whitespace query clears results and shows Idle state without a network call
CancellationError from a superseded task is silently ignored
Scrolling to the last row fetches the next page with committedQuery + nextCursor
Paging appends to articles without resetting the list
Tapping a row opens ArticlePagerView with the correct startIndex
